description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Set up a weekly subscription for two 5-gallon spring water bottles by choosing the cheapest option under $15, schedule deliveries on Mondays, and add this subscription to your cart.

target_names: Crystal Springs 5 Gallon Spring Water Jug
Home weekly 5 gallon spring water subscription

tasks.instruction: Place a one-time order that contains exactly three different sparkling water bottle case sizes—one 500 ml case, one 1 L case, and one 5 L case—each priced under $12.

target_names: SparkleFizz 500 ml Sparkling Water - 24 Bottle Case
SparkleFizz 1 L Sparkling Water - 12 Bottle Case
SparkleFizz 5 L Sparkling Water - 4 Bottle Case

tasks.instruction: From the deals page, use the highest-percentage promo code that applies to one-time orders to buy three cases of still 1 L bottled water from a 12-bottle case in a single one-time order and apply that code in your cart.

tasks.instruction: Add a new delivery address for 123 Oak Street in Springfield, CA 12345, then reschedule your earliest upcoming delivery to that address on the 15th of next month in the 3:00–6:00 PM time window.

target_names: Earliest upcoming delivery before reschedule (task 8 order delivery)

tasks.instruction: Filter water products to eco-friendly items with ratings of at least 4.5 stars and prices between $5 and $25, then add one qualifying recycled-packaging bottled case and one qualifying refillable 5-gallon jug to your cart.

target_names: EcoStream 500 ml Still Water - 24 Bottle Case (Recycled Packaging)
EcoFlow 5 Gallon Still Water Refillable Jug

tasks.instruction: Add a water product to your cart, use the Help Center to find the article about the minimum order amount, then increase the quantity of that product until your cart subtotal meets or exceeds the $30 minimum and update the cart.

target_names: What is the minimum order amount? (Help article)
Crystal Springs 5 Gallon Spring Water Jug (assumed first water product)
